name: Comeuppance
oracleText: Prevent all damage that would be dealt to you and planeswalkers you control this turn by sources you don't control. If damage from a creature source is prevented this way, Comeuppance deals that much damage to that creature. If damage from a noncreature source is prevented this way, Comeuppance deals that much damage to the source's controller.

name: Leyline Binding
oracleText: Flash Domain — This spell costs {1} less to cast for each basic land type among lands you control. When this enchantment enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield.

name: Nine Lives
oracleText: Hexproof If a source would deal damage to you, prevent that damage and put an incarnation counter on this enchantment. When there are nine or more incarnation counters on this enchantment, exile it. When this enchantment leaves the battlefield, you lose the game.

name: Path to Exile
actualAnalyzerRoles: land_acceleration, land_tutor, mana_fixing, ramp, removal, targeted_removal, tutor
oracleText: Exile target creature. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

name: Reprieve
oracleText: Return target spell to its owner's hand. Draw a card.

name: Rest in Peace
oracleText: When this enchantment enters, exile all graveyards. If a card or token would be put into a graveyard from anywhere, exile it instead.

name: Wedding Ring
actualAnalyzerRoles: card_draw, copy_support, direct_draw, donation_support, draw, lifegain, repeatable_advantage, repeatable_draw
oracleText: When this artifact enters, if it was cast, target opponent creates a token that's a copy of it. Whenever an opponent who controls an artifact named Wedding Ring draws a card during their turn, you draw a card. Whenever an opponent who controls an artifact named Wedding Ring gains life during their turn, you gain that much life.

name: Clever Impersonator
oracleText: You may have this creature enter as a copy of any nonland permanent on the battlefield.

name: Counterspell
manualNotes: Covered by Ice Age role audit.
oracleText: Counter target spell.

name: Lorthos, the Tidemaker
oracleText: Whenever Lorthos attacks, you may pay {8}. If you do, tap up to eight target permanents. Those permanents don't untap during their controllers' next untap steps.

name: Mindbreak Trap
oracleText: If an opponent cast three or more spells this turn, you may pay {0} rather than pay this spell's mana cost. Exile any number of target spells.

name: Mystic Confluence
actualAnalyzerRoles: card_draw, direct_draw, draw, removal, soft_stack, stack, tempo_removal
oracleText: Choose three. You may choose the same mode more than once. • Counter target spell unless its controller pays {3}. • Return target creature to its owner's hand. • Draw a card.

name: Ponder
oracleText: Look at the top three cards of your library, then put them back in any order. You may shuffle. Draw a card.

name: Rite of Replication
oracleText: Kicker {5} (You may pay an additional {5} as you cast this spell.) Create a token that's a copy of target creature. If this spell was kicked, create five of those tokens instead.

name: Traumatize
oracleText: Target player mills half their library, rounded down.

name: Feed the Swarm
oracleText: Destroy target creature or enchantment an opponent controls. You lose life equal to that permanent's mana value.

name: Hex
oracleText: Destroy six target creatures.

name: Infernal Grasp
oracleText: Destroy target creature. You lose 2 life.

name: Opposition Agent
oracleText: Flash You control your opponents while they're searching their libraries. While an opponent is searching their library, they exile each card they find. You may play those cards for as long as they remain exiled, and you may spend mana as though it were mana of any color to cast them.

name: Reanimate
oracleText: Put target creature card from a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control. You lose life equal to that card's mana value.

name: Saw in Half
oracleText: Destroy target creature. If that creature dies this way, its controller creates two tokens that are copies of that creature, except their power is half that creature's power and their toughness is half that creature's toughness. Round up each time.

name: Skithiryx, the Blight Dragon
oracleText: Flying Infect (This creature deals damage to creatures in the form of -1/-1 counters and to players in the form of poison counters.) {B}: Skithiryx gains haste until end of turn. {B}{B}: Regenerate Skithiryx.

name: Goblin Bombardment
oracleText: Sacrifice a creature: This enchantment deals 1 damage to any target.

name: Najeela, the Blade-Blossom
actualAnalyzerRoles: combat_body, combat_finisher, combat_support, finisher, lifegain, multiplier_support, repeatable_finisher, replacement_engine
oracleText: Whenever a Warrior attacks, you may have its controller create a 1/1 white Warrior creature token that's tapped and attacking. {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}: Untap all attacking creatures. They gain trample, lifelink, and haste until end of turn. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase. Activate only during combat.

name: Relentless Assault
oracleText: Untap all creatures that attacked this turn. After this main phase, there is an additional combat phase followed by an additional main phase.

name: Savage Beating
actualAnalyzerRoles: combat_finisher, combat_support, finisher, multiplier_support, replacement_engine, tap_untap, tempo_support
oracleText: Cast this spell only during combat on your turn. Choose one — • Creatures you control gain double strike until end of turn. • Untap all creatures you control. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase. Entwine {1}{R} (Choose both if you pay the entwine cost.)

name: Shock

name: Winds of Change
oracleText: Each player shuffles the cards from their hand into their library, then draws that many cards.

name: Arachnogenesis
oracleText: Create X 1/2 green Spider creature tokens with reach, where X is the number of creatures attacking you. Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt this turn by non-Spider creatures.

name: Arasta of the Endless Web
oracleText: Reach Whenever an opponent casts an instant or sorcery spell, create a 1/2 green Spider creature token with reach.

name: Beast Within
oracleText: Destroy target permanent. Its controller creates a 3/3 green Beast creature token.

name: Heroic Intervention
oracleText: Permanents you control gain hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.

name: Hunter's Insight
oracleText: Choose target creature you control. Whenever that creature deals combat damage to a player or planeswalker this turn, draw that many cards.

name: Parallel Lives
oracleText: If an effect would create one or more tokens under your control, it creates twice that many of those tokens instead.

name: Silkguard
actualAnalyzerRoles: broad_protection, counter_support, mana_sink, protection, scalable_spell, self_protection
oracleText: Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to X target creatures you control. Auras, Equipment, and modified creatures you control gain hexproof until end of turn. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)

name: Tangle
oracleText: Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt this turn. Each attacking creature doesn't untap during its controller's next untap step.

name: Alibou, Ancient Witness
actualAnalyzerRoles: artifact_support, card_selection, combat_body, combat_support, direct_finisher, finisher, removal, repeatable_advantage, scalable_spell, selection, targeted_removal

name: Terminate
